zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry De Broughton於1240年出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德時，他的父親Adam de Napton I83歲，母親Isolda de Salceto38歲。他於從1245年1月8日到1246年1月7日與Isolda Meuland在英國瓦維其可爾納普頓 奧 馮 希爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1271年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry De Broughton于1240年出生在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德时，他的父亲Adam de Napton I83岁，母亲Isolda de Salceto38岁。他于从1245年1月8日到1246年1月7日与Isolda Meuland在英国瓦維其可爾納普頓 奧 馮 希爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1271年在英国英格兰藍卡爾享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Broughton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in all parts of England called Broughton. The first element is variously Old English brōc ‘brook’, burg ‘fortress’, or beorg ‘hill, mound’; the second is in all cases Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Braughton
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Broughton  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Henry De Broughton was born in 1240, in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Adam de Napton I, was 83 and his mother, Isolda de Salceto, was 38. He married Isolda Meuland from 8 January 1245 to 7 January 1246, in Napton on the Hill, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1271, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry De Broughton est né en 1240, à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam de Napton I, avait 83 ans et sa mère, Isolda de Salceto, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Isolda Meuland du 8 janvier 1245 au 7 janvier 1246, à Napton on the Hill, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1271, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry De Broughton 1240 in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam de Napton I 83 und seine Mutter Isolda de Salceto 38. Er hat von 8. Januar 1245 bis 7. Januar 1246 in Napton on the Hill, Warwickshire, England Isolda Meuland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1271 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry De Broughton è nato il nel 1240 nel Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Adam de Napton I, aveva 83 anni e il suo madre, Isolda de Salceto, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Isolda Meuland da 8 gennaio 1245 a 7 gennaio 1246, nel Napton on the Hill, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1271, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry De Broughtonが1240年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドで生まれた時，父Adam de Napton Iは83歳，母Isolda de Salcetoは38歳であった。から1245年1月8日まで1246年1月7日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアナプトン オン ス ヒルでIsolda Meulandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1271年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry De Broughton(이)가 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Napton I(은)는 83세였고, 그의 어머니 Isolda de Salceto(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1245년 1월 8일부터 1246년 1월 7일까지 영국 워윅실르 나프턴  테 힐에서 Isolda Meuland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1271년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry De Broughton nasceu em 1240, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Adam de Napton I, tinha 83 anos e sua mãe, Isolda de Salceto, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Isolda Meuland de 8 de janeiro de 1245 a 7 de janeiro de 1246, em Napton on the Hill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1271, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry De Broughton родился в 1240 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Adam de Napton I было 83 года, а матери, которую звали Isolda de Salceto, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Isolda Meuland с 8 января 1245 по 7 января 1246 в местности наптон он т хилл, варвиккшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1271 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.
